creator: cpm@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 190671
patch

Since upgrading to meson 0.44.0, the paths generated from a call to gnome.compile_resources include the subdirectory twice, breaking the build.

The attached patch [1] fixes the issue.

[1] https://github.com/mesonbuild/meson/issues/2860#issuecomment-355544682
